title: ReverieMC Client Modpack
description: This is a client-side modpack intended to be used on the ReverieMC Kingdoms 1.20.2 server. It supports various vanilla+ features such as Xaero's FAIR PLAY Mini-Map, World Map, Sodium (anti-lag), and more!
body:
Introducing the ReverieMC-approved client-side Minecraft modpack designed to enhance your survival experience. This meticulously curated collection includes AppleSkin, offering insightful details about your character's hunger and saturation. Navigate your inventory seamlessly with JustEnoughItems (JEI), ensuring efficient crafting and item lookup.

 

Say goodbye to lag with Sodium, an anti-lag mod that optimizes your gameplay, accompanied by Sodium Extra for additional performance enhancements. Stay oriented with Xaero's MiniMap (FAIR PLAY EDITION), providing a clear and concise view of your surroundings. For a broader perspective, explore Xaero's World Map, a valuable tool for navigation and exploration. Elevate your gameplay on ReverieMC with this thoughtfully assembled modpack, designed to complement the server's environment while adhering to approved modifications.
